error.title: Something went wrong
error.body: Something went wrong on our end.

validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

auth.unlockReason: Unlock Qeema to view your finances

welcome.headline: Know what your money is really worth
welcome.subtext: Track your savings against inflation and see your real purchasing power over time.
welcome.guestDisclosure: No account needed. You can create one later.

error.networkError: No internet connection. Please check your network and try again.
error.tooManyRequests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.unknownError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error.anonymousSignInDisabled: Guest sign-in is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

onboarding.slide1Headline:
Your money has a number.
Does it still have the same value?
onboarding.slide1Body: The gap between what you have and what it's worth grows every day. See it happen to your own savings.
onboarding.slide2Body: Cash, dollars, gold — logged in seconds, always in view. Know where your money is at a glance.
onboarding.slide3Headline:
See inflation happening,
not just hear about it
onboarding.slide3Body: Watch how your real value moves against the nominal number over time — made personal, not abstract.
onboarding.slide4Body: No bank connection, no transfers — just clarity on what your savings are really worth.

appLock.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again later.
appLock.noCredentials: No device lock set up. Set up a screen lock in your device settings.
appLock.unavailable: Device authentication is not available on this device.

settings.requireUnlock: Require device unlock to open Qeema
settings.noDeviceLock: Your device doesn't have a screen lock set up. Set one up in your device settings to use this feature.

assetPerformance.title: Best performing asset
assetPerformance.body: Asset {id} leads your portfolio with a value of {value} EGP.

concentrationRisk.title: High concentration risk
concentrationRisk.body: Over 80% of your portfolio is in one asset type. Consider diversifying to reduce risk.

inflationLoss.title: Inflation erosion detected
inflationLoss.body: Your money has lost {erosion}% of its purchasing power since you started tracking.

goalFeasibility.title: Savings goal check
goalFeasibility.body: At the current pace of inflation, your savings goals may need to be revised upward to maintain their real value.
